answers.answer: C) Flag SSO and 2FA as separate tickets - they are significant features beyond password reset. Reason: SSO with Google/GitHub and 2FA are major features requiring separate design, implementation, testing, and security review. They are NOT scope creep of a password reset flow - they are entirely different authentication methods. Adding them to this ticket would: (1) blow up the timeline; (2) mix unrelated concerns; (3) delay the original password reset feature. Best practice: complete the original ticket, then create separate tickets for SSO and 2FA with proper estimation.
